revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{#invoke:HTMLDecode | HTMLDecode | text={{PAGENAME}} }}|pattern=^%d%d%d%d archaeological discoveries$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:YYYY archaeological discoveries category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form "YYYY archaeological discoveries", where YYYY is a 4-digit year}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{Category explanation|'''[[archaeological discovery|archaeological discoveries]]''' in the '''year [[{{Title year}}]]'''}} {{Category series navigation|skip-gaps=yes}} {{Cat more if exists|{{Title year}} in archaeology}} [[Category:{{Title year}} in science|Archaeological discoveries]] [[Category:{{DECADE|{{Title year}}}} archaeological discoveries|{{Title year}}]] [[Category:Archaeological discoveries by year|{{Title year}}]]}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:YYYY archaeological discoveries category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form "YYYY archaeological discoveries", where YYYY is a 4-digit year}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{CatAutoTOC}}{{Documentation|content=Use this to create a category of the form "YYYY archaeological discoveries ", where YYYY is a 4-digit year e.g. [[:Category:1965 archaeological discoveries]] == Usage == {{YYYY archaeological discoveries category header}} No parameters needed == See also == * [[:Template:YYY0s archaeological discoveries category header]] }} [[Category:Archaeology templates]] [[Category:Chronology category header templates]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
